title: task
description: sim_client.py:107-134 - If TCP connection succeeds but registration fails (MSG_ERR or unexpected response), the stream is left open. The socket leaks because SimRadioError is raised without closing self._stream first. Fix: wrap the registration exchange in try/finally or explicitly close on error paths.
close_reason: Already fixed: stream cleanup on registration failure already implemented at lines 136-141 (try/except BaseException closes stream before re-raising)
